title: UserRegisteredV2
description:
Event emitted when a new user successfully registers. Schema version 2.0.

Migration notes from v1:
- `data.given_name` replaces `data.first_name` (canonical field).
- `data.family_name` replaces `data.last_name` (canonical field).
- `data.first_name` and `data.last_name` are kept as optional aliases so that
  v1 consumers (tolerant readers) continue to work without changes.
- `data.locale` and `data.display_name` are new optional fields.

event_id.description: Unique identifier for this event instance.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when the event occurred.

correlation_id.description: Optional trace/correlation identifier propagated from the originating request.

user_id.description: Primary key of the newly registered user.

email.description: Verified email address of the user.

given_name.description: Given (first) name of the user. Canonical field in v2.

family_name.description: Family (last) name of the user. Canonical field in v2.

first_name.description: Deprecated alias for given_name. Populated with the same value for backward compatibility with v1 consumers. Will be removed in v3.

last_name.description: Deprecated alias for family_name. Populated with the same value for backward compatibility with v1 consumers. Will be removed in v3.

display_name.description: Optional display name. Defaults to given_name + family_name when absent.
